subject: fix(theme): make CSS the single source of truth for theme colors
body:
The previous approach created a separate constants file that still
required manual sync with the CSS @theme tokens — defeating the purpose.
Now vite.config.ts reads src/index.css directly at build time and
regex-extracts --color-background and --color-primary. Change a color
in CSS and it automatically flows to PWA manifest and HTML meta tags.

Tags: infrastructure, theme, build
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-centralization
Semver: patch
